title: Incubation Recovery and Pre-Amplification PCR Protocol
author: Opentrons
materials: Samples are moved to a PCR strip tube prior to thermocycler step as outlined in procedure documentation

steps.title: This is the first of four...
steps.instruction: This is the first of four parts for a custom PCR prep followed by two stage cleanup.

steps.title: 125 uL of recovery agent is added to samples
steps.instruction: 125 uL of recovery agent is added to samples

steps.title: 2 minute delay until a biphasic mixture is attained
steps.instruction: 2 minute delay until a biphasic mixture is attained

steps.title: Visual inspection should occur of the...
steps.instruction: Visual inspection should occur of the biphasic mixture then resume is selected in the app.

steps.title: Recovery agent is removed from the...
steps.instruction: Recovery agent is removed from the samples, leaving only a clear liquid in the wells

steps.title: 35 uL of pre-amplification mix is added to the samples
steps.instruction: 35 uL of pre-amplification mix is added to the samples
